strategy.name: Antigravity — MCB v6 + TTC Confluence
strategy.description: WaveTrend extremes (±65) as the primary signal filter, confirmed by TTC 7-condition confluence scoring. Only trades at true exhaustion points — not momentum, not trend-following. Tested at 80% win rate on BTC daily.

indicators.wavetrend: Core signal engine. WT1 (Lt Blue Wave) and WT2 (Blue Wave) from MarketCipher_B. Signal fires when WT2 crosses ±65 — this marks true seller/buyer exhaustion, not just an oversold reading.
indicators.ttc_trend: EMA 21 vs EMA 50 — directional bias filter. EMA21 > EMA50 = bullish alignment. EMA21 < EMA50 = bearish.
indicators.rsi_14: RSI(14) — momentum filter. < 40 = long bias. > 65 = short bias. 40–65 = neutral, no contribution.
indicators.stoch_rsi_k: Stochastic RSI K — oscillator confirmation. < 20 = oversold (long). > 80 = overbought (short).
indicators.mfi_14: Money Flow Index(14) — volume-weighted flow. < 30 = accumulation (long). > 70 = distribution (short).
indicators.vwap: VWAP — price bias. Price above VWAP = long favoured. Price below VWAP = short favoured.
indicators.bollinger_bands: Bollinger Bands — volatility extreme. Price below lower band = long. Price above upper band = short.
indicators.atr_14: ATR(14) — used for stop loss (1.5×) and take profit (4.5×) calculation only.

bullish: Weekly MCB waves above zero (macro filter)
Daily WT2 approaching or below -65 (exhaustion zone)
bearish: Weekly MCB waves below zero (macro filter)
Daily WT2 approaching or above +65 (exhaustion zone)
neutral_skip: WT2 between -40 and +40 — no signal, wait
TTC long score < 2 AND TTC short score < 2 — no confluence, skip
Weekly and daily MCB direction disagree — reduce size or skip

ttc_scoring.description: 7 binary conditions. Each gives +1 Long or +1 Short. Minimum score of 2 required to confirm entry. Score of 4+ = high conviction.

long: WT2 (Blue Wave) crosses below -65 — buyer exhaustion confirmed
WT1 crosses above WT2 — bullish momentum turn
TTC Long score ≥ 2 out of 7 conditions
Price above EMA 200 (preferred — relaxed for alts)
short: WT2 (Blue Wave) crosses above +65 — seller exhaustion confirmed
WT1 crosses below WT2 — bearish momentum turn
TTC Short score ≥ 2 out of 7 conditions

exit_rules: Stop loss: 1.5× ATR(14) below entry (long) or above entry (short)
Take profit: 4.5× ATR(14) above entry (long) or below entry (short) — 1:3 R:R
Maximum hold: 40 daily bars — exit at market if neither SL nor TP hit
Early exit: WT2 crosses back through zero line with opposing TTC score ≥ 4
risk_rules: Never risk more than 2% of portfolio per trade
Maximum trade size capped by MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD in .env
Maximum trades per day capped by MAX_TRADES_PER_DAY in .env
BTC only for high-confidence trades (80% WR backtested) — alts carry higher false-signal risk
No longs on ETH, SOL, SUI when price is below EMA 200
Reduce position size to 50% when TTC score is exactly 2 (minimum threshold)
Full position size when TTC score ≥ 4 (high conviction)
Paper trade first — validate live signal matches backtest conditions before going live

asset_notes.BTCUSDT: Primary asset. 80% WR backtested on 300 daily bars. Full strategy applies.
asset_notes.XRPUSDT: 50% WR. Viable with TTC ≥ 3 filter. Watch WT2 — closest to -65 currently.
asset_notes.FETUSDT: 43% WR but profitable (+9.86€) due to strong TP hits. Trade with caution.
asset_notes.PEPEUSDT: 33% WR. Only trade with TTC ≥ 3. Nov cluster creates false longs.
asset_notes.SUIUSDT: 33% WR. Extreme oversold (RSI 8.8, Stoch 7.1 weekly). No EMA200 history.
asset_notes.SOLUSDT: 33% WR. Most oversold (RSI 8.6 weekly). Below EMA200 — no longs yet.
asset_notes.ETHUSDT: 33% WR, -5.14€. Below EMA200. No longs until structure recovers.

morning_brief_notes: Check Weekly MCB first — sets the macro bias for all 7 assets
Check WT2 distance from ±65 — anything within 10 points is worth watching
Check TTC score — if ≥ 4 on any asset, that is today's primary watch
No signal is valid unless WT2 has actually crossed ±65 — approaching is not enough
